Interactive Checklist

Google Business Profile
Checklist for UK Trades

A complete, step-by-step checklist to optimise your Google Business Profile and rank higher in local search. Tick items off as you go — your progress saves automatically.

Start the Checklist
0/42 complete (0%)

Profile Basics

Photos & Media

Reviews & Reputation

Posts & Content

Q&A & Engagement

Advanced Optimisation

Category Recommendations

Primary
Plumber
Secondary
Emergency Plumber
Drainage Service
Bathroom Renovator
Heating Contractor

Photo Guidelines

1
Logo
Clear, square logo (720x720px minimum). No text overlays.
1
Cover Photo
Showcase your best work. 1332x400px minimum. Bright, well-lit.
3-5
Exterior
Your van, branded uniform, tools. Helps customers recognise you.
10-15
Work Photos
Before/during/after shots. Label with short captions.
2-3
Team Photos
Friendly, professional. Builds trust with homeowners.
2-3
Certificates / Insurance
Gas Safe, NICEIC, CHAS. Builds authority.

Review Request Template

Subject
Quick feedback on your recent plumbing job
Body
Hi [Name], thanks for choosing [Business Name] for your plumbing work. If you're happy with the service, a quick Google review would mean the world to us. It helps other homeowners find a reliable plumber. Just click here: [Review Link]

Post Strategy for Trades

1x per weekOffer / Promotion

"10% off boiler servicing this month — book now"

1x per weekCompleted Job Photo

"Before & after kitchen rewire for a happy customer in [Area]"

2x per monthTip / Educational

"3 signs your boiler needs a service before winter"

1x per monthTeam / Behind the Scenes

"Meet Dave — our senior sparky with 15 years experience"

Pre-Populated Q&A for Your Profile

Ask these questions from a personal Google account, then answer them from your business profile. This saves customers time and ranks you for common search queries.
